title: Cena al Ristorante Italiano
opening: Buonasera! Avete deciso o desiderate ancora qualche minuto per il menu?

t1.prompt: Buonasera! Avete deciso o desiderate ancora qualche minuto per il menu?
t1.promptTranslation: Bwona-seh-ra! Ah-veh-teh deh-chee-zoh oh deh-zee-deh-rah-teh ahn-koh-ra kwahl-keh mee-noo-toh pehr eel meh-noo? — Good evening! Have you decided or would you like a few more minutes with the menu?

t2.prompt: Certo! Tra i nostri piatti forti, oggi abbiamo un ottimo risotto ai funghi porcini e un branzino al sale che è squisito. Avete delle preferenze o restrizioni alimentari?
t2.promptTranslation: Chayr-toh! Trah ee noh-stree pyah-tee fohr-tee, oh-jee ahb-byah-moh oon oh-ttee-moh ree-zoh-ttoh ahy foon-ghee pohr-chee-nee eh oon brahn-tzee-noh ahl sah-leh keh eh skwee-zee-toh. Ah-veh-teh del-leh preh-feh-ren-tseh oh reh-stree-tsyoh-nee ah-lee-men-tah-ree? — Certainly! Among our main dishes, today we have an excellent porcini mushroom risotto and a sea bass baked in salt, which is exquisite. Do you have any preferences or dietary restrictions?

t3.prompt: Perfetto, cosa posso portarvi di buono stasera?
t3.promptTranslation: Pehr-feh-ttoh, koh-zah pohs-soh pohr-tahr-vee dee bwoh-noh stah-seh-ra? — Perfect, what can I get for you this evening?

t4.prompt: Ottima scelta! Il branzino al sale viene sfilettato al tavolo, con contorno di patate e verdure. Oppure, per i vegetariani, potremmo proporvi una deliziosa parmigiana di melanzane. Cosa preferite?
t4.promptTranslation: Oh-ttee-mah shyel-tah! Eel brahn-tzee-noh ahl sah-leh vyeh-neh sfee-leh-tah-toh ahl tah-voh-loh, kohn kohn-tor-noh dee pah-tah-teh eh vehr-doo-reh. Ohp-poo-reh, pehr ee veh-jeh-tah-ryah-nee, poh-trehm-moh pro-pohr-vee oo-nah deh-lee-tsyoh-zah pahr-mee-jah-nah dee meh-lahn-dzah-neh. Koh-zah preh-feh-ree-teh? — Excellent choice! The sea bass in salt is filleted at the table, with a side of potatoes and vegetables. Or, for vegetarians, we could offer you a delicious eggplant parmesan. What do you prefer?

t5.prompt: Perfetto. E da bere, qualcosa in particolare? Magari un buon vino per accompagnare?
t5.promptTranslation: Pehr-feh-ttoh. Eh dah beh-reh, kwahl-koh-zah een pahr-tee-koh-lah-reh? Mah-gah-ree oon bwohn vee-noh pehr ahk-kohm-pah-nyah-reh? — Perfect. And to drink, anything in particular? Perhaps a good wine to accompany it?

t6.prompt: Ottimo. Porterò subito le bevande e poi il vostro ordine arriverà a breve. Buon appetito!
t6.promptTranslation: Oh-ttee-moh. Pohr-teh-roh soo-bee-toh leh beh-vahn-deh eh pwoy eel voh-stroh ohr-dee-neh ahr-ree-veh-rah ah breh-veh. Bwohn ahp-peh-tee-toh! — Excellent. I'll bring the drinks right away and then your order will arrive shortly. Enjoy your meal!

t7.prompt: Prego. Desiderate qualcos'altro, magari un dolce o un caffè per concludere?
t7.promptTranslation: Preh-goh. Deh-zee-deh-rah-teh kwahl-koh-z'ahl-troh, mah-gah-ree oon dohl-cheh oh oon kahf-feh pehr kohn-kloo-deh-reh? — You're welcome. Would you like anything else, perhaps a dessert or a coffee to finish?

t8.prompt: Certo. Ecco il conto. Grazie e buona serata!
t8.promptTranslation: Chayr-toh. Ehk-koh eel kohn-toh. Grah-tsee-eh eh bwoh-nah seh-rah-tah! — Certainly. Here's the bill. Thank you and good evening!

t-repeat.prompt: Mi scusi, non ho capito bene. Potrebbe ripetere, per favore?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Mee skoo-zee, non oh kah-pee-toh beh-neh. Poh-treh-bbeh ree-peh-teh-reh, pehr fah-voh-reh? — Excuse me, I didn't quite understand. Could you please repeat that?
